ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Time interval of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" INTEGER /* Maximum total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "current_supply" INTEGER /* Current circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deactivated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the setting */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* Widgets included in the dashboard */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the dashboard */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the settings were last modified */,
  "default_layout" TEXT /* Default layout for the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Time interval of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., AI, expert, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Time interval of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., news website, blog) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the original news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wallet */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the wallet was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the wallet was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wallet (e.g., active, frozen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
